title: Pentaheart Reforged
description: Modpack for a group of friends and their server. Based on the Official Cobblemon modpack with some extras
body:
Based on the [Cobblemon Official Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric).

Adds in extras such as
- Tom's Simple Storage Mod and Expanded Storage for some basic, mass storage.
- Cobblepedia, Cobbledex Recrafted, and Cobblemon Pokenav for an in-game Dex, Wiki, and Spawn check.
- Cobbreeding to add Eggs and Breeding.
- CobblemonTrainers to add customizable NPC Trainers.
- Cobblemon FC Gym Badges for some simple Gym Badges you can earn from friends or trainers.
- Fuller's Pokecenters so you can always find a healer in every village.
- Rotom Phone Cobblemon lets you take a healer and PC everywhere with you.
- Ascension Megamons (Cobblemon) adds in some Mega Evolutions.
- Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon adds items and conditions to allow Legendaries and Mythicals to spawn.
- Cobblemon Hunt adds a questing element to catching Cobblemons, earning currency for completing them (currency handled with Impactor).
- Pebble's Chest Shop allows players to create custom shops to buy and sell items (currency handled with Impactor).
- Jakotens' Pokémon Trainer Cosmetics! lets you wear hats like other trainers.
- CobblemonExtras adds commands where you can showcase Cobblemon, initiate Trades or Battles, and various other server side commands.


Pack is mainly geared towards a group of friends
